chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR 1st Civil Appeal No.D-26 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case. 21-02-2024 None present for the appellant. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** None present for the appellant. The case diaries shows that earlier also when none was present on behalf of appellant, this appeal was dismissed vide order dated 07.09.2021, but on the request of learned counsel for appellant and with consent, this appeal was restored to its original position vide order dated 18.10.2023, but thereafter on 30.11.2023, no one was present on behalf of appellant and today also none has appeared and no intimation is received. Accordingly, this 1st Civil Appeal is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
